events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer exactly one valid JSON object matching schema. No prose outside JSON. We have scenario: selected tool and material package for Data/comm & security matches size, rating, application shown on referenced sheet. Staged parts clean, intact, sized. Reference material TIA-568, NEC 800. We need evaluate field condition and return decision. Since staged, no defects flagged, matches specs, likely pass. Need fill fields. component_conditions none flagged, so empty list. percent_complete 0 because staged not begun. value 0, sound_source empty string or source when asked; not asked maybe empty. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list unless asked. findings empty. actions empty. rationale brief. references standards. risk low. confidence high, maybe 0.95. Need ensure valid JSON. No markdown fences.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision": "pass", "risk": "low", "work_stage": "staged", "component_conditions": [], "percent_complete": 0, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0.0, "rate": 0.0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": [], "actions": [], "rationale": "Staged materials and tools match the specified size, rating, and application for data/comm and security work, with parts clean and intact. No defects or code violations are evident at this pre-installation stage.", "references": ["TIA-568", "NEC 800"]}
